_readme: The web-editable slice of serverDZ.cfg. Apply-ServerCfg.ps1 renders serverDZ.cfg at EVERY prestart from serverDZ.cfg.template + host.env (the two passwords) + this file, so a value changed in the web editor lands on the next restart with no deploy. ONLY the keys below may be set - the renderer's allowlist is closed, so anything else here is ignored with a warning. Everything NOT listed (password, passwordAdmin, verifySignatures, shardId, instanceId, guaranteedUpdates, serverTime, storageAutoFix, vppDisablePassword, adminLogPlayerList, loginQueue*, class Missions) stays owned by the template because changing it breaks server identity, persistence, or the boot itself: instanceId/shardId select the storage folder (a change reads as a full wipe), verifySignatures is a security control, and the active map comes from map.env, not the Missions class. Values are validated by type and range; a bad one is skipped with a warning and the template default stands. serverTimeAcceleration/serverNightTimeAcceleration drive the day/night cycle - see the Server tab's cycle sliders, or docs/SETUP.md for the math.

_help.rotateDarkNights: When 1, flips lightingConfig (darker vs brighter night) on EVERY reboot, so alternate 4-hour sessions run darker then normal. When 0, lightingConfig is used exactly as set below. This is a control, not a serverDZ.cfg field - it steers lightingConfig, it is never written to the cfg itself.
_help.description: Description of the server. Gets displayed to users in client server browser.
_help.forceSameBuild: When enabled, the server will allow the connection only to clients with same the .exe revision as the server (value 0-1)
_help.disableVoN: Enable/disable voice over network (0 = VoN ENABLED, 1 = disabled)
_help.vonCodecQuality: Voice over network codec quality, the higher the better (values 0-30)
_help.disable3rdPerson: Toggles the 3rd person view for players (value 0-1)
_help.disablePersonalLight: Disables personal light for all clients connected to server
_help.lightingConfig: 0 for brighter night setup, 1 for darker night setup
_help.serverNightTimeAcceleration: Accelerated Nigh Time - The numerical value being a multiplier (0.1-64) and also multiplied by serverTimeAcceleration value. Thus, in case it is set to 4 and serverTimeAcceleration is set to 2, night time would move 8 times faster than normal. An entire night would pass in 3 hours.
